channel.title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Citadel and Cathie Wood back Zero, a new blockchain designed for traditional finance
item.description: LayerZero launches its layer-1 blockchain Zero with partners Intercontinental Exchange and the DTCC.

item.title: 4 charts show why massive AI spending has started to weigh on Big Tech
Hate your job? Here's why that's a good thing!
Dow logs another record, but stocks end mostly lower as economic worries emerge
Dow eyes 3rd straight record close in final hour; S&P 500 and Nasdaq slip — live
Crypto caution weighs on Robinhood’s sales — and sinks its stock
The new CEO leading Saks Global through bankruptcy follows a management philosophy of ‘leading with love’
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Leaders are increasingly worried about an economic downturn, inflation, and an asset bubble bust
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: The oil CEO who stood up to Trump is a follower of the disciplined ‘Exxon way’ and has a history of blunt statements
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: One reason CEOs tie layoffs to AI? It motivates remaining employees to adopt the technology
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.
